mapper.sql: SELECT a.user_id , a.user_login_id , a.user_name , a.gender_type_cd , a.user_email , safe_decrypt(a.user_tel,'${db_encrypt_key}') AS user_tel , a.del_yn , a.in_admin_id , TO_CHAR(a.in_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS in_datetime , a.up_admin_id , TO_CHAR(a.up_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS up_datetime FROM "public"."DRUGSAFE_USER" a WHERE 1=1 AND a.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY a.user_id DESC
mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id , a.user_login_id , a.user_name , a.user_email , safe_decrypt(a.user_tel, '${db_encrypt_key}') AS user_tel , a.gender_type_cd , a.del_yn , a.in_admin_id , TO_CHAR(a.in_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , a.up_admin_id , TO_CHAR(a.up_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM "public"."DRUGSAFE_USER" a WHERE 1=1 AND a.del_yn = 'N' AND a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE public.drugsafe_user SET user_pw = COALESCE(#{userPw}, user_pw) , user_name = COALESCE(#{userName}, user_name) , user_tel = safe_encrypt(#{userTel},'${db_encrypt_key}') , user_email = COALESCE(#{userEmail}, user_email) , gender_type_cd = COALESCE(#{genderTypeCd}, gender_type_cd) , up_admin_id = COALESCE(#{upAdminId}, up_admin_id) , up_datetime = now() WHERE 1=1 AND del_yn = 'N' AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE public.drugsafe_user SET del_yn = 'Y' , up_admin_id = COALESCE(#{upAdminId}, up_admin_id) , up_datetime = now() WHERE 1=1 AND del_yn = 'N' AND user_id = #{userId}
